code: import React from'react';import{Navbar,Container,Nav}from'react-bootstrap';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function NavigationBar(){const handleClick=sectionId=>{const section=document.querySelector(sectionId);if(section){const navbarHeight=document.querySelector('.navbar').offsetHeight;const sectionPosition=section.offsetTop-navbarHeight;window.scrollTo({top:sectionPosition,behavior:'smooth'});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{collapseOnSelect:true,expand:"lg",bg:"dark",variant:"dark",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Container,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar.Brand,{href:"#home",children:"Portfolio"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar.Toggle,{"aria-controls":"responsive-navbar-nav"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar.Collapse,{id:"responsive-navbar-nav",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Nav,{className:"me-auto",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Nav.Link,{onClick:()=>handleClick('#section-0'),children:"Section 0"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Nav.Link,{onClick:()=>handleClick('#section-1'),children:"Section 1"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Nav.Link,{onClick:()=>handleClick('#section-2'),children:"Section 2"})]})})]})});}export default NavigationBar;
